origin.description: Receiving station. All coordinates are signed relative to this point.

coordinate_system.x_axis: East is positive. West into warehouse = negative X.
coordinate_system.y_axis: North is positive. Into warehouse interior = positive Y.

bin_label_format.note: HomeSource 3-part join key: row token, 2-digit bay, level. Zone is carried as a separate field on each bin record and does not appear in the label string. Intentionally diverges from db_connect sample (4-part zone-prefixed pattern) to match the WMS join-key format.
